title: Misinformation Detection Output
description: Output schema for the DeBERTa v3-large binary misinformation classifier. Classifies a single social media post as misinformation or non-misinformation with confidence scores, risk assessment, and severity rating.

model_id.description: Registry identifier for the model, e.g. 'misinfo-deberta'.

id.description: Input post identifier (echoed back from request).

author_name.description: Post author name (echoed back from request).

platform.description: Source platform, e.g. 'TWITTER', 'FACEBOOK' (echoed back from request).

content.description: Original post text content (echoed back from request).

share_count.description: Number of shares/retweets (echoed back from request).

ts.description: Post timestamp in ISO-8601 format (echoed back from request).

post_url.description: URL of the original post (echoed back from request).

confidence.description: Softmax probability of the predicted class.

risk_score.description: Risk score derived from max softmax probability.

severity.description: Severity rating based on risk_score thresholds: CRITICAL >= 0.9, HIGH >= 0.75, MEDIUM >= 0.6, LOW < 0.6.

checkpoint.description: Path to the model checkpoint used for this prediction.
